title: heliophila arenosa
intro: Heliophila arenosa, also known as the sandy heliophila, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is native to southern Africa and is often found growing in sandy areas and rocky outcrops. The medicinal properties of Heliophila arenosa include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support respiratory health, with herbal preparations often involving infusions or decoctions of the leaves and roots.
